name.it: DPS da Reazione Fuori Campo & Supporto Cure

notes.en: [[character:jahoda]] offers continuous healing for the active character with her [[ability:burst]], and Off-Field Elemental Application with her infused [[ability:skill]] and [[ability:burst]]. While Ascendant Gleam is active, her [[ability:skill]] can steal enemy auras and use them for herself.
notes.fr: [[character:jahoda]] offre un soin continu au personnage actif avec son [[ability:burst]], ainsi qu'une application élémentaire off-field avec son [[ability:skill]] et son [[ability:burst]] infusés. Tant que Lueur ascendante est active, son [[ability:skill]] peut voler les auras ennemies et les utiliser pour elle-même.
notes.it: [[character:jahoda]] offre cure continue al personaggio attivo tramite il suo [[ability:burst]], ed applicazione elementale da fuori campo tramite l'infusione dell'[[ability:skill]] e del [[ability:burst]]. Mentre Presagio lunare: Barlume ascendente è attivo, la sua [[ability:skill]] può assorbire le aure nemiche.

notes.en: [[character:jahoda]] heavily favors having Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam.
notes.fr: [[character:jahoda]] préfère fortement avoir le Signe lunaire : Lueur ascendante.
notes.it: [[character:jahoda]] predilige fortemente che Presagio lunare: Barlume ascendente sia attivo.

notes.fr: La priorité d'infusion de son [[ability:skill]] et de son [[ability:burst]] est [[element:pyro]] > [[element:hydro]] > [[element:electro]] > [[element:cryo]].

notes.en: If the active character has 70% HP or more, [[character:jahoda]]'s [[ability:burst]] will also heal the character with the lowest HP.
notes.fr: Si le personnage actif a 70 % de PV ou plus, l'[[ability:burst]] de [[character:jahoda]] soignera aussi le personnage avec le moins de PV.
notes.it: Se il personaggio attivo ha 70% o più PS, il [[ability:burst]] di [[character:jahoda]] curerà anche il personaggio con il minor numero di PS.

notes.en: [[character:jahoda]]'s [C6] will only take effect if the Purr-Loined Treasure Flask is full.
notes.fr: La [C6] de [[character:jahoda]] ne prendra effet que si le Flacon au trésor chapardé est plein.
notes.it: La **[C6]** di Jahoda avrà effetto solo se la Fiaschetta preziosa Purr purr è piena.
